summary:
Fixed cache invalidation bugs.

Changes made in app/server.py:

1. After updating a product (PUT /products/{id}):
   • Delete cache entry for that product and the product list.
   • Optionally repopulate cache with the updated product.

2. After creating a product (POST /products):
   • Delete the product list cache so subsequent list requests include the new product.

Running test.sh now passes:

PASS: Cache correctly invalidated after writes
